title: aira acutigluma
intro: Aira acutigluma is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Asia and Europe, scientifically known as a species of the grass family, Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Aira acutigluma lie in its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to help alleviate health issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Aira acutigluma can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be consumed as a herbal remedy to harness its medicinal properties.
